input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.16 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.16
            TITLE: buckling modulus (ei)

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.16: Buckling Modulus (EI)
F.1.16 Buckling Modulus (EI) 
Equal to E*I, where E = modulus of Elasticity, and I = area moment of inertia about the 
weakest axis.

final_answer: rule F.1.16: Buckling Modulus (EI) F.1.16 Buckling Modulus (EI) Equal to E*I, where E = modulus of Elasticity, and I = area moment of inertia about the weakest axis.
